TREES UPROOTED. CENTER PIVOT MANGLED. 3 STEEL POWER POLES BENT AT BASE. MAX WINDS 115 MPH. MAX WIDTH 275 YARDS.

TWO EMPTY AND UN-ANCHORED 10X14 OUTBUILDINGS, LOCATED NORTH OF THE DOUBLE L CAFE, ON HWY 71 4 MILES SE OF HARRISBURG, NE, WERE FLIPPED UPSIDE DOWN BY WIND, ESTIMATED TO BE ABOUT 55 MPH. THE OUTBUILDINGS ARE ALL WOOD CONSTRUCTION AND HAD NO AWNINGS OR OPEN GARAGE DOORS TO HELP CATCH THE WIND. THEY WERE FOUND VIRTUALLY IN THE SAME LOCATION THEY WERE BEFORE THE WIND, JUST UPSIDE DOWN.
